summary: Freight transportation company Norfolk Southern (NYSE:NSC) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 11.4% year on year to $3.47 billion. Its GAAP profit of $3.26 per share was 0.6% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Union Pacific picks up Canadian National's support for its plan to acquire Norfolk Southern railroad
summary: Union Pacific struck a deal with Canadian National to secure that rival's support for its proposed $85 billion acquisition of Norfolk Southern railroad.  The deal to create the nation's first transcontinental railroad has been divisive within the industry because it would concentrate so much market power in the hands of one company that would control more than 40% of all rail traffic and reduce the number of major freight railroads in the United States down to five.  BNSF, CPKC and CSX railroads all strongly oppose the merger, but now Canadian National said it will support it after winning concessions from Union Pacific.

raw.headline: Union Pacific picks up Canadian National's support for its plan to acquire Norfolk Southern railroad
raw.summary: Union Pacific struck a deal with Canadian National to secure that rival's support for its proposed $85 billion acquisition of Norfolk Southern railroad.  The deal to create the nation's first transcontinental railroad has been divisive within the industry because it would concentrate so much market power in the hands of one company that would control more than 40% of all rail traffic and reduce the number of major freight railroads in the United States down to five.  BNSF, CPKC and CSX railroads all strongly oppose the merger, but now Canadian National said it will support it after winning concessions from Union Pacific.

headline: Lockheed Martin, Quest Diagnostics, Thermo Fisher Scientific And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Thursday
summary: U.S. stocks were down as Dow Jones fell 450 points on Thursday. Lockheed Martin (LMT) shares rose 11.4% on better-than-expected results. Other big gainers were NVE Corp (NVEC), Gibo Holdings Ltd (GIBO), Novocure Ltd (NVCR), Cleveland-Cliffs Inc (CLF), Merlin Inc (MRLN), Medpace Holdings Inc (MEDP), Oatly Group AB (OTLY), Imax Corp (IMAX), United Rentals Inc (URI), Oceaneering International Inc (OII), and Quest Diagnostics Inc (DGX).
